source: Markets in Profile (Dalton), Visual Guide to Options (Levy), A Random Walk Down Wall Street (Malkiel)
description: Standardized entry models derived from professional trading literature. These are not suggestions — they are proven frameworks.

step1_determine_regime.trending: Price making higher highs/lows (up) or lower highs/lows (down). Profile elongated. Follow the trend, DO NOT fade.
step1_determine_regime.bracketing: Price oscillating between support and resistance. Profile fat/balanced. Fade extremes, buy low sell high within range.
step1_determine_regime.transitioning: Market breaking out of bracket. Profile shifting. Most profitable moment — trade the breakout direction.

open_drive.description: Market opens and aggressively auctions in one direction without looking back. Strongest conviction signal.
open_drive.action: Enter immediately in direction of drive. This is institutional money moving. Do NOT fade.

open_test_drive.description: Market opens, tests one direction briefly, then reverses and drives the opposite way.
open_test_drive.action: Wait for the test to fail, then enter in the drive direction after confirmation.

open_rejection_reverse.description: Market opens in one direction, gets rejected at a key level, and reverses.
open_rejection_reverse.action: Enter after rejection is confirmed (price moves back through opening range).

open_auction.description: Market opens and rotates without conviction. No clear direction.
open_auction.action: WAIT. Do not trade until direction emerges. This is the most common and least tradeable open.

model_1_excess_fade.name: Fade Excess at Value Area Extremes
conditions: Market in bracketing/balanced regime
Price reaches Value Area High (VAH) or Value Area Low (VAL)
Single prints (excess) appear at the extreme — price was rejected
Volume decreases at the extreme (buyers/sellers drying up)
model_1_excess_fade.entry: Fade the extreme. Short at VAH with excess, Long at VAL with excess.
model_1_excess_fade.sl: Beyond the excess prints (the absolute high/low of the session)
model_1_excess_fade.tp: Point of Control (POC) — the price with most volume/time
model_1_excess_fade.gamma_confirmation: In positive gamma regime, this model is STRONGEST (dealers support mean reversion). In negative gamma, be cautious — excess can be violated.
spotgamma_signals: Price near call wall (short) or put wall (long)

model_2_breakout_follow.name: Bracket Breakout Follow-Through
conditions: Market has been in bracket (range) for multiple sessions
Price breaks above/below the bracket range
Volume INCREASES on the breakout (new money entering)
Initial Balance (first hour) is wide — strong early conviction
model_2_breakout_follow.entry: Enter in breakout direction after price clears the bracket extreme AND holds for at least 15 minutes.
model_2_breakout_follow.sl: Just inside the broken bracket boundary (if it goes back inside, breakout failed)
model_2_breakout_follow.tp: Measure the bracket range and project it from the breakout point (measured move)
model_2_breakout_follow.gamma_confirmation: In negative gamma, breakouts ACCELERATE (dealers amplify moves). In positive gamma, breakouts tend to fail — be skeptical.

model_3_inventory_correction.name: Short Covering Rally / Long Liquidation Break
conditions: Market approaches a previous significant low (for shorts) or high (for longs)
Multiple time frames are positioned in the same direction (too short or too long)
Excess forms at the test level — the retest doesn't make a new extreme
Profile shows p-shape (short covering) or b-shape (long liquidation)
model_3_inventory_correction.entry: Enter in the correction direction when excess forms. p-shape = buy. b-shape = sell.
model_3_inventory_correction.sl: Beyond the excess low (p-shape) or excess high (b-shape)
model_3_inventory_correction.tp: Value area of the prior balance area
model_3_inventory_correction.gamma_confirmation: Check institutional positioning (net puts vs net calls at key strikes). If heavy short positioning at support, squeeze is likely.
spotgamma_signals: Large net put positioning at support (short squeeze potential)
HIRO starting to rise from 30th percentile
Tape flipping from bearish to neutral

model_4_poor_high_low.name: Poor High / Poor Low Retest
conditions: Previous session left a 'poor high' (no excess, flat top) or 'poor low' (no excess, flat bottom)
Poor highs/lows indicate unfinished business — the auction will likely revisit
Current price is approaching the poor high/low area
model_4_poor_high_low.entry: When price revisits a poor high/low, watch for either: (a) price punches through and continues = FOLLOW, or (b) excess finally forms = FADE.
model_4_poor_high_low.sl: Depends on which scenario plays out
model_4_poor_high_low.tp: If follow: next structural level. If fade: POC of current range.
model_4_poor_high_low.gamma_confirmation: Poor highs near call wall are especially powerful — dealers and auction structure both resist.
spotgamma_signals: Call wall or put wall at the poor high/low level
Key gamma strike at the same level

model_5_trend_day.name: Trend Day Recognition and Entry
conditions: Open-Drive or Open-Test-Drive opening type
Initial Balance (first hour range) is narrow — coiled spring
Price breaks out of Initial Balance with conviction
Profile stays elongated — no rotation back to the mean
Volume increases as the trend progresses
model_5_trend_day.entry: Enter on the first pullback to the prior period's value area. Or enter on the IB breakout with a market order.
model_5_trend_day.sl: Below the IB low (uptrend) or above the IB high (downtrend). On trend days, if price comes back to IB, the trend is likely over.
model_5_trend_day.tp: Let it run. Trail stop using each new period's low (uptrend) or high (downtrend). Trend days can move 2-3x normal range.
model_5_trend_day.gamma_confirmation: Negative gamma + trend day = monster move. Dealers are FORCED to hedge in the same direction, amplifying everything.
spotgamma_signals: HIRO accelerating in trend direction (>70th or <30th percentile)

model_6_gap_fill.name: Gap Fill / Gap and Go
conditions_fill: Market gaps open above/below prior close
Gap is within implied move range (not an outlier event)
Volume is LOW on the gap — no new conviction
conditions_go: Market gaps open and does NOT fill within first 30 minutes
Gap exceeds implied move range (paradigm shift)
model_6_gap_fill.entry_fill: Fade the gap. Short if gap up, Long if gap down. Wait for first 15min to confirm no follow-through.
model_6_gap_fill.entry_go: Follow the gap. Enter in gap direction if price holds above/below gap edge for 30min.
model_6_gap_fill.sl_fill: Above gap high (fading gap up) or below gap low (fading gap down)
model_6_gap_fill.sl_go: At the gap fill level (if it fills, thesis is wrong)
spotgamma_signals: Gamma regime determines fill vs go
VRP positive = fill likely. VRP negative = go likely.
Implied move percentage as gap size reference

model_7_vanna_flow.name: Vanna Flow Trade (VIX-driven)
conditions_bearish_indices: Index vanna active = dealers selling to hedge
UVIX rising faster than VIX (convexity bid)
conditions_bullish_gold: VIX spiking + UVIX-GLD divergence signal = buy_gold
GLD positive gamma (supports mean reversion to upside)
model_7_vanna_flow.entry_short_indices: Short NAS100 or US30 when VIX confirms acceleration + tape bearish + HIRO dropping below 30th pctile.
model_7_vanna_flow.entry_long_gold: Long XAUUSD when refuge flow activates + UVIX-GLD buy signal + GLD holding above put wall.
model_7_vanna_flow.sl: Use gamma levels: SL above call wall (shorts) or below put wall (longs)

position_management.breakeven_rule: Move SL to breakeven when price reaches 1R (1x your risk distance) in your favor.
position_management.partial_take: Take 50% profit at first structural target (POC, value area edge, or TP1). Let rest run with trailed SL.
position_management.trail_method: Trail SL using structural levels: each new period's value area low (longs) or high (shorts). Not arbitrary distances.
position_management.cut_rule: Close immediately if: (1) gamma regime flips while in trade, (2) HIRO reverses >20 percentile points against you, (3) open type next session contradicts your position.
position_management.add_rule: Add to position ONLY if: (1) price pulls back to value and holds, (2) new excess forms confirming your direction, (3) volume supports continuation.

risk_rules.max_risk_per_trade: 2% of account (with $972 account = $19.44 max loss per trade)
risk_rules.max_daily_loss: 5% of account ($48.60). If hit, stop trading for the day.
risk_rules.position_sizing: Calculate: volume = max_risk / (SL_distance_points × value_per_point). Round down to nearest 0.01 lots.
risk_rules.correlation_limit: If long NAS100, don't also long US30 (correlated ~85%). Diversify across uncorrelated CFDs.
